subject: docs: capture DaisyUI component-class migration sweep (10 phases)
body:
Record the full 10-phase DaisyUI component-class migration in the
project-wide docs so future sessions have the same context without
needing to rebuild it from commit logs.

- SESSION_NOTES.md: new "Recent Updates (2026-04-13)" block at the top
  summarizing all 10 phases with commit hashes, the shadowing-risk
  before/after audit, and the list of surfaces deliberately NOT
  migrated (HamburgerMenu dropdown, MultiSelect listbox,
  CollapsibleSection, drawer-style panes) with rejection reasoning.
- HISTORY.md: new dated 2026-04-13 entry with phase-by-phase detail,
  including every class deletion, every consumer migration, and
  explicit alternative-rejection reasoning. Also records the build
  verification steps (10 consecutive vite builds) and the testing
  gap (no browser runtime test performed).
- TODO.md: removed the "Component class migration to DaisyUI" item —
  it's now complete — and updated the last-updated footer to reflect
  the 2026-04-13 sweep.
- TESTING_GUIDE.md: new "DaisyUI component-class migration" section
  under the Theme block with a per-phase verification checklist
  (modal, toast, health alert, timeline badge, card, btn, tabs,
  select/input, hamburger audit, listbox checkbox) that exercises
  each migrated surface in both a light and a dark theme.

Tags: documentation, daisyui, migration
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-component-migration
Semver: patch
